title: Desaturated Mushroom Island Grass
description: Changes the grass color of the mushroom island from the vibrant jungle green to the plains green
body:
# **Desaturated Mushroom Island Grass**

I wanted a large island without mobs, but the overly saturated grass in the Mushroom Island hurt my eyes, so I created a resource pack that replaces the vibrant green color of grass and foliage in Mushroom Islands with the more toned-down plains green. 


**THIS DOES NOT CHANGE MYCELIUM. IT ONLY AFFECTS NORMAL GRASS AND FOLIAGE**

The pack only slightly edits the biome colormaps, so it should work for any version, even if it shows incompatibility.


# **Comparison**

![Comparison between pack and vanilla with a grassified Mushroom Island.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fe4c0ab28a8993d709ca7ddb3d691cd4757bd73.png)
